zh-CN.test_definition: 这是一份基于 60 道自我报告题的情绪与关系模式报告，用于解释你如何感知、调节、回应和管理自己与他人的情绪。
zh-CN.self_report_statement: 本报告反映你对自身情绪与关系模式的主观感知，不等同于客观能力测验。
zh-CN.non_clinical_statement: 本报告不用于临床诊断、治疗建议或危机评估。
zh-CN.non_hiring_statement: 本报告不用于招聘筛选、录用、晋升或其他高风险人事决策。
zh-CN.non_ability_statement: 本报告不是认证能力测验，也不声称测量真实情商能力。
zh-CN.norm_status_statement: 当前常模为阶段性常模，百分位和标准分用于解释相对位置，后续会随样本增长持续校准。
zh-CN.quality_rules_statement: 系统会参考作答时长、长串作答、极端反应、中立反应和一致性信号，给出解释置信度。
zh-CN.version_statement: 报告版本 eq_report_v5_assets，计分版本 v1.0_normed_validity，内容版本 EQ_60/v1。

en.test_definition: This is an emotional and relational pattern report based on 60 self-report items. It explains how you notice, regulate, respond to, and manage emotions in yourself and others.
en.self_report_statement: This report reflects your subjective self-perception of emotional and relational patterns. It is not an objective ability test.
en.non_clinical_statement: This report is not for clinical diagnosis, treatment advice, or crisis evaluation.
en.non_hiring_statement: This report is not for hiring, selection, promotion, or other high-stakes employment decisions.
en.non_ability_statement: This report is not a certified ability assessment and does not claim to measure true emotional intelligence ability.
en.norm_status_statement: Current norms are provisional. Percentiles and standard scores explain relative position and will be recalibrated as samples grow.
en.quality_rules_statement: The system considers response time, long-string patterns, extreme responding, neutral responding, and consistency signals to estimate interpretation confidence.
en.version_statement: Report version eq_report_v5_assets, scoring version v1.0_normed_validity, content version EQ_60/v1.

zh-CN.label: 情绪与关系综合指数
zh-CN.meaning: 综合四个维度的自我报告信号，描述当前情绪与关系功能的整体稳定度。

en.label: Emotional & Relational Functioning Index
en.meaning: A combined self-report signal across four dimensions, describing the current stability of emotional and relational functioning.

zh-CN.standard_score: 标准分以阶段性常模为参照，平均附近代表稳定可用。
zh-CN.percentile: 百分位表示在当前参考样本中的相对位置，不代表能力认证。

en.standard_score: Standard scores are interpreted against provisional norms. Scores near the mean indicate a stable usable range.
en.percentile: Percentiles indicate relative position in the current reference sample and are not ability certification.

foundational.zh-CN: 基础发展中：当前信号提示该能力更需要外部结构、练习和复盘支持。
foundational.en: Foundational: the current signal suggests this area benefits from more structure, practice, and review.

developing.zh-CN: 发展中：已经有可用基础，但在压力或复杂关系中可能不够稳定。
developing.en: Developing: usable foundations are present, but the pattern may be less stable under pressure or relational complexity.

stable.zh-CN: 稳定可用：多数日常场景中可以发挥作用，但仍需要看和其他维度的组合。
stable.en: Stable: generally usable in everyday contexts, while interpretation still depends on how it combines with other dimensions.

proficient.zh-CN: 熟练成熟：该维度通常是可依赖的优势信号，也可能带来相应消耗。
proficient.en: Proficient: this dimension is usually a reliable strength signal and may also carry related costs.

integrated.zh-CN: 高度整合：该维度表现突出，重点是避免过度使用并保持情境灵活性。
integrated.en: Integrated: this dimension is prominent; the key is avoiding overuse and staying contextually flexible.

zh-CN.label: 自我觉察
zh-CN.definition: 识别、命名和理解自身情绪线索的倾向。

band_explanations.foundational: 自我觉察处于基础发展中，建议先练习用具体词语命名情绪。
band_explanations.developing: 自我觉察已有基础，但在压力下可能较晚发现真实触发点。
band_explanations.stable: 自我觉察稳定可用，通常能理解自己的主要情绪线索。
band_explanations.proficient: 自我觉察较成熟，能较快捕捉情绪变化和背后需求。
band_explanations.integrated: 自我觉察高度整合，重点是避免过度分析并转向行动。

en.label: Self-Awareness
en.definition: The tendency to notice, name, and understand emotional cues in yourself.

band_explanations.foundational: Self-awareness is foundational; start by naming emotions with specific words.
band_explanations.developing: Self-awareness has a base, but real triggers may be noticed late under pressure.
band_explanations.stable: Self-awareness is stable and usually helps you understand key emotional cues.
band_explanations.proficient: Self-awareness is mature enough to catch shifts and underlying needs quickly.
band_explanations.integrated: Self-awareness is highly integrated; the focus is avoiding over-analysis and moving to action.

zh-CN.label: 情绪调节
zh-CN.definition: 在压力、反馈或冲突中恢复、暂停和选择回应方式的倾向。

band_explanations.foundational: 情绪调节处于基础发展中，建议先建立暂停和恢复流程。
band_explanations.developing: 情绪调节已有基础，但强反馈或冲突中仍可能不稳定。
band_explanations.stable: 情绪调节稳定可用，多数日常压力下能找到恢复方式。
band_explanations.proficient: 情绪调节较成熟，能在触发后较快回到可沟通状态。
band_explanations.integrated: 情绪调节高度整合，重点是避免过度控制并保留真实感受。

en.label: Emotion Regulation
en.definition: The tendency to recover, pause, and choose responses during pressure, feedback, or conflict.

band_explanations.foundational: Emotion regulation is foundational; build a pause and recovery process first.
band_explanations.developing: Emotion regulation has a base, but strong feedback or conflict may still destabilize it.
band_explanations.stable: Emotion regulation is stable and usually supports recovery in everyday pressure.
band_explanations.proficient: Emotion regulation is mature enough to return to communication after being triggered.
band_explanations.integrated: Emotion regulation is highly integrated; avoid over-control and keep authentic feeling available.

zh-CN.label: 共情理解
zh-CN.definition: 理解他人情绪、立场和关系线索的倾向。

band_explanations.foundational: 共情理解处于基础发展中，建议先练习确认对方感受。
band_explanations.developing: 共情理解已有基础，但可能错过隐性情绪或真实需求。
band_explanations.stable: 共情理解稳定可用，多数场景能把握他人基本感受。
band_explanations.proficient: 共情理解较成熟，能较细腻地捕捉关系和情绪线索。
band_explanations.integrated: 共情理解高度整合，重点是避免过度承接他人情绪。

en.label: Empathy
en.definition: The tendency to understand other people's emotions, perspectives, and relational cues.

band_explanations.foundational: Empathy is foundational; start by confirming the other person's feeling.
band_explanations.developing: Empathy has a base, but hidden emotion or real needs may be missed.
band_explanations.stable: Empathy is stable and usually helps you grasp basic feelings in others.
band_explanations.proficient: Empathy is mature enough to notice relational and emotional cues with nuance.
band_explanations.integrated: Empathy is highly integrated; avoid over-carrying other people's emotions.

zh-CN.label: 关系管理
zh-CN.definition: 在沟通、协作、修复和边界中采取建设性行动的倾向。

band_explanations.foundational: 关系管理处于基础发展中，建议先学习低风险沟通脚本。
band_explanations.developing: 关系管理已有基础，但在冲突、边界或修复中可能不稳定。
band_explanations.stable: 关系管理稳定可用，多数协作场景中能采取建设性行动。
band_explanations.proficient: 关系管理较成熟，能主动推进沟通、协调和修复。
band_explanations.integrated: 关系管理高度整合，重点是避免承担过多协调责任。

en.label: Relationship Management
en.definition: The tendency to act constructively in communication, collaboration, repair, and boundaries.

band_explanations.foundational: Relationship management is foundational; start with low-risk communication scripts.
band_explanations.developing: Relationship management has a base, but conflict, boundaries, or repair may be unstable.
band_explanations.stable: Relationship management is stable and usually supports constructive action in collaboration.
band_explanations.proficient: Relationship management is mature enough to actively support communication, coordination, and repair.
band_explanations.integrated: Relationship management is highly integrated; avoid taking too much coordination responsibility.

zh-CN.title: 均衡整合型
zh-CN.one_liner: 你的情绪与关系信号比较均衡，优势在于稳定和可迁移。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你通常能同时看见自己、理解他人，并在多数情境中维持可用的回应方式。
evidence_basis: 四维分数相对均衡
无明显单一短板
zh-CN.primary_strength: 稳定性和多场景适应能力。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 容易低估特定高压情境对自己的消耗。
zh-CN.development_lever: 选择一个真实场景做精细化复盘，而不是泛泛提升。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不代表你在任何情境中都不会被触发。

en.title: Balanced Integration
en.one_liner: Your emotional and relational signals are relatively balanced; stability is the main strength.
en.core_claim: You usually notice yourself, understand others, and maintain usable responses across many contexts.
evidence_basis: Four dimensions are relatively balanced
No single severe gap stands out
en.likely_cost: You may underestimate how specific high-pressure contexts drain you.
en.development_lever: Choose one real situation for precise review rather than trying to improve everything.
en.do_not_overread: This does not mean you will never be triggered.

zh-CN.title: 高共情，低恢复
zh-CN.one_liner: 你容易理解他人感受，但恢复和边界是当前杠杆。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你可能很快接住别人的情绪，却不一定能及时把对方状态和自己的状态分开。
evidence_basis: EM 明显高于 ER
共情信号强于恢复信号
zh-CN.primary_strength: 对他人状态敏感，容易建立信任。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 在冲突、求助或高情绪劳动场景中容易被卷入。
zh-CN.development_lever: 共情之后建立边界和恢复动作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 发展方向不是减少共情，而是让共情更有边界。

en.title: High Empathy, Low Recovery
en.one_liner: You tend to understand others quickly, while recovery and boundaries are the current lever.
en.core_claim: You may absorb other people's emotions quickly without separating their state from your own soon enough.
evidence_basis: EM is meaningfully higher than ER
Empathy signal is stronger than recovery signal
en.primary_strength: Sensitivity to others and trust building.
en.likely_cost: Conflict, support, and high emotional-labor settings may pull you in too deeply.
en.development_lever: Build boundaries and recovery after empathy.
en.do_not_overread: The goal is not less empathy; it is empathy with clearer boundaries.

zh-CN.title: 高觉察，调节不足
zh-CN.one_liner: 你能知道自己怎么了，但不一定能很快恢复。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你可能很快觉察到被触发，却需要更稳定的暂停、命名和复位动作。
evidence_basis: SA 高于 ER
自我识别强于调节行动
zh-CN.primary_strength: 能捕捉自己的情绪变化。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 知道问题但仍被情绪带着走。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把觉察转成具体调节步骤。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 觉察本身不是问题，问题在于缺少后续动作。

en.title: Aware but Under-Regulated
en.one_liner: You may know what is happening inside, but recovery may lag.
en.core_claim: You may notice triggers quickly and still need steadier pause, labeling, and reset actions.
evidence_basis: SA is higher than ER
Self-recognition is stronger than regulation action
en.primary_strength: You can catch emotional shifts in yourself.
en.likely_cost: You may know the issue while still being carried by the emotion.
en.development_lever: Turn awareness into concrete regulation steps.
en.do_not_overread: Awareness is not the problem; the missing step is what follows.

zh-CN.title: 冷静稳定，但回应偏远
zh-CN.one_liner: 你较能维持稳定，但可能不够读懂或回应他人情绪。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你在压力下可能保持冷静，但关系中的温度和回应需要更多主动性。
evidence_basis: ER 高于 EM
稳定信号强于共情信号
zh-CN.likely_cost: 他人可能感到你不够理解或靠近。
zh-CN.development_lever: 在稳定之外增加情绪确认。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 冷静不等于冷漠，但需要被他人感受到。

en.title: Calm but Distant
en.one_liner: You may stay steady while reading or responding to others less actively.
en.core_claim: You may remain calm under pressure, but warmth and relational response need more intentional action.
evidence_basis: ER is higher than EM
Stability signal is stronger than empathy signal
en.primary_strength: You are less likely to be disrupted by the emotional field.
en.likely_cost: Others may feel less understood or less met.
en.do_not_overread: Calm is not coldness, but it needs to be felt by others.

zh-CN.title: 关系优先，自我后置
zh-CN.one_liner: 你能维护关系，但可能晚一步看见自己的真实感受。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你倾向先让关系顺畅，再处理自己的边界、需求和消耗。
evidence_basis: RM 高于 SA
关系行动强于自我连接
zh-CN.primary_strength: 能维持合作和关系稳定。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 长期忽略自己的感受和界限。
zh-CN.development_lever: 在回应别人前先确认自己的底线。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 重视关系不是问题，自我后置过久才是风险。

en.title: Relationship First, Self Later
en.one_liner: You can maintain relationships, but may notice your own feelings too late.
en.core_claim: You tend to keep the relationship smooth before checking your own boundaries, needs, and cost.
evidence_basis: RM is higher than SA
Relational action is stronger than self-connection
en.primary_strength: You can preserve cooperation and relational stability.
en.likely_cost: You may overlook your feelings and limits over time.
en.development_lever: Check your bottom line before responding to others.
en.do_not_overread: Valuing relationships is not the issue; staying self-later for too long is the risk.

zh-CN.title: 自我清楚，修复不足
zh-CN.one_liner: 你知道自己的感受，但关系修复动作需要更清晰。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你可能能表达立场，却不一定能把表达转成可继续合作的关系动作。
evidence_basis: SA 高于 RM
自我清楚强于关系修复
zh-CN.primary_strength: 有清楚的自我感受和判断。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 表达后关系可能停在紧张或防御状态。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把表达、确认和修复连成一组动作。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 清楚表达不是攻击，关键是加上修复。

en.title: Self-Clear, Repair Weaker
en.one_liner: You may know your feelings while needing clearer relational repair moves.
en.core_claim: You may state your position without always turning it into actions that keep collaboration possible.
evidence_basis: SA is higher than RM
Self-clarity is stronger than repair
en.likely_cost: After expression, the relationship may remain tense or defensive.
en.development_lever: Connect expression, acknowledgment, and repair as one sequence.
en.do_not_overread: Clear expression is not attack; the key is adding repair.

zh-CN.title: 稳定协作型
zh-CN.one_liner: 你在压力下较能维持合作和修复。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你通常能在情绪波动中保持可沟通，并把关系拉回可协作状态。
evidence_basis: ER 与 RM 都较高
压力恢复和关系行动同向
zh-CN.primary_strength: 压力下仍能保持建设性。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 可能承担过多协调责任。
zh-CN.development_lever: 区分需要你修复的事和不该由你承担的事。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 稳定协作不意味着你必须负责所有人的情绪。

en.title: Steady Collaborator
en.one_liner: You tend to maintain collaboration and repair under pressure.
en.core_claim: You can often stay communicative during emotional shifts and bring the relationship back to workable ground.
evidence_basis: ER and RM are both relatively high
Recovery and relational action move together
en.likely_cost: You may take on too much coordination responsibility.
en.development_lever: Separate what is yours to repair from what is not yours to carry.
en.do_not_overread: Being steady does not make you responsible for everyone else's emotions.

zh-CN.title: 高敏感，易吸收
zh-CN.one_liner: 你很能感知自己和他人，但也更容易被情绪环境影响。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你可能同时捕捉自己的细微信号和他人情绪，因此需要更强的区分与恢复。
evidence_basis: SA 与 EM 较高
ER 相对较低
zh-CN.likely_cost: 容易过度加工或吸收环境情绪。
zh-CN.development_lever: 区分我的感受、他人的感受和现场压力。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 敏感不是脆弱，它需要更好的过滤系统。

en.title: Sensitive Absorber
en.one_liner: You notice yourself and others strongly, and may be more affected by the emotional field.
en.core_claim: You may catch subtle self-signals and other people's emotions at the same time, requiring stronger separation and recovery.
evidence_basis: SA and EM are relatively high
ER is relatively lower
en.likely_cost: You may over-process or absorb environmental emotion.
en.development_lever: Separate my feeling, their feeling, and situational pressure.
en.do_not_overread: Sensitivity is not weakness; it needs a better filtering system.

zh-CN.title: 基础发展中
zh-CN.one_liner: 多个情绪与关系信号仍在打基础，适合从一个小场景开始练。
zh-CN.core_claim: 你的结果提示当前不宜追求复杂技巧，先建立命名、暂停和复盘的基础动作更重要。
evidence_basis: 多个维度处于基础或发展区间
没有稳定优势维度足以独立支撑
zh-CN.primary_strength: 可塑性强，适合从低风险场景开始。
zh-CN.likely_cost: 同时处理太多关系任务会增加压力。
zh-CN.development_lever: 先练一个最小闭环：识别、暂停、选择下一句。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这不是能力定论，而是当前自我报告信号。

en.title: Developing Foundation
en.one_liner: Several emotional and relational signals are still foundational; start with one small context.
en.core_claim: The result suggests starting with basic labeling, pausing, and review before complex techniques.
evidence_basis: Multiple dimensions are foundational or developing
No stable strength is strong enough to carry the pattern alone
en.primary_strength: High room for growth through low-risk practice.
en.likely_cost: Handling too many relational tasks at once can increase pressure.
en.development_lever: Practice one small loop: notice, pause, choose the next sentence.
en.do_not_overread: This is not a fixed ability judgment; it is the current self-report signal.

zh-CN.title: 本次结果置信度不足
zh-CN.one_liner: 本次作答质量信号降低了解释置信度，建议先谨慎阅读。
zh-CN.core_claim: 系统检测到会影响解释稳定性的作答模式，因此不应输出强人格判断。
evidence_basis: 质量等级为 C 或 D
存在速度、长串、极端、中立或不一致信号
zh-CN.likely_cost: 具体维度和画像容易被误读。
zh-CN.development_lever: 在状态稳定时复测，或只使用低风险建议。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 不要把这次结果作为稳定结论。

en.title: Lower Confidence Result
en.one_liner: Response-quality signals reduce interpretation confidence; read this result cautiously.
en.core_claim: The system detected response patterns that can reduce interpretive stability, so strong personality claims should not be made.
evidence_basis: Quality level is C or D
Speed, long-string, extreme, neutral, or inconsistency signals are present
en.primary_strength: It can still serve as a reflection cue.
en.likely_cost: Specific dimensions and patterns may be overread.
en.development_lever: Retake when stable, or use only low-risk suggestions.
en.do_not_overread: Do not treat this result as a stable conclusion.

zh-CN.title: 知道自己，也能复位
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 自我觉察只有接上调节动作，才会变成现实中的稳定回应。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你通常能说清自己怎么了，并较快找到下一步。
zh-CN.strength: 减少反复内耗，把情绪信息转成行动。
zh-CN.cost: 可能过度依赖自我控制，忽略休息需求。
zh-CN.development_lever: 让复位动作更轻量。
zh-CN.micro_action: 用一句话命名情绪，再决定下一句怎么说。

en.title: You notice yourself and can reset
en.why_it_matters: Self-awareness becomes real-world stability only when it connects to regulation.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can usually name what is happening and find the next step.
en.strength: Less rumination; more action from emotional information.
en.cost: You may over-rely on self-control and miss rest needs.
en.micro_action: Name the emotion in one sentence, then choose the next sentence.

zh-CN.title: 知道自己，但恢复跟不上
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 觉察会放大感受，如果没有调节动作，反而更容易卡住。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你知道自己被触发了，但身体和语气不一定跟得上。
zh-CN.strength: 能早期识别风险信号。
zh-CN.cost: 容易陷入反复解释或自责。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把觉察后 30 秒变成固定流程。
zh-CN.micro_action: 暂停、命名、喝水或离开屏幕 60 秒。

en.title: You notice yourself, but recovery lags
en.why_it_matters: Awareness can intensify feelings when no regulation step follows.
en.what_it_feels_like: You know you are triggered, but your body or tone may not catch up.
en.strength: Early detection of risk signals.
en.cost: You may loop in explanation or self-blame.
en.development_lever: Turn the first 30 seconds after awareness into a routine.
en.micro_action: Pause, label, drink water, or step away from the screen for 60 seconds.

zh-CN.title: 能稳定，但不总知道原因
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 调节有效，但如果不理解触发点，模式会重复出现。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能忍住或恢复，但事后未必知道自己为何被影响。
zh-CN.strength: 压力下不易失控。
zh-CN.cost: 复盘不足会让同类问题反复。
zh-CN.development_lever: 补上事后命名。
zh-CN.micro_action: 事后写下：刚才我真正介意的是什么。

en.title: You can stabilize without always knowing why
en.why_it_matters: Regulation helps, but without understanding triggers the pattern repeats.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can hold or recover, but may not know what affected you.
en.strength: Less likely to lose control under pressure.
en.cost: Weak review lets similar problems recur.
en.micro_action: Afterward, write: what did I actually care about?

zh-CN.title: 识别和恢复都需要打底
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 如果既难识别也难复位，复杂场景会迅速耗尽资源。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你可能到事后才发现自己已经很累或很烦。
zh-CN.strength: 适合从最小动作建立可预测性。
zh-CN.cost: 高压沟通中容易被动应对。
zh-CN.development_lever: 先练一个简单情绪词表。
zh-CN.micro_action: 每天一次选择一个情绪词，并写下触发场景。

en.title: Both recognition and recovery need foundations
en.why_it_matters: When both noticing and resetting are hard, complex situations drain resources quickly.
en.what_it_feels_like: You may realize only afterward that you were tired or irritated.
en.strength: Small actions can build predictability.
en.cost: High-pressure communication may become reactive.
en.development_lever: Start with a simple emotion vocabulary.
en.micro_action: Once a day, choose one emotion word and write the trigger.

zh-CN.title: 能理解别人，也能保留自己
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 共情和恢复并存时，理解他人不必以自我消耗为代价。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能靠近他人情绪，也能及时回到自己的节奏。
zh-CN.strength: 支持他人而不容易被吞没。
zh-CN.cost: 可能被期待持续承担情绪支持。
zh-CN.development_lever: 明确支持边界。
zh-CN.micro_action: 先确认对方需要倾听、建议还是具体帮助。

en.title: You understand others and keep yourself
en.why_it_matters: When empathy and recovery coexist, understanding others does not require self-drain.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can approach others' emotions and return to your own rhythm.
en.strength: Support without being swallowed by the situation.
en.cost: Others may expect constant emotional support.
en.micro_action: Ask whether they need listening, advice, or concrete help.

zh-CN.title: 共情强，边界和恢复偏弱
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 你越能理解别人，越需要知道哪些情绪不是你要承担的。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 别人难受时，你可能很快进入帮助或自责状态。
zh-CN.strength: 容易让人感到被看见。
zh-CN.cost: 容易吸收过多情绪劳动。
zh-CN.development_lever: 共情后加一句边界确认。
zh-CN.micro_action: 在心里说：这是对方的感受，我可以支持，但不需要代替。

en.title: Strong empathy, weaker boundaries and recovery
en.why_it_matters: The more you understand others, the more you need to know what is not yours to carry.
en.what_it_feels_like: When someone is distressed, you may quickly move into helping or self-blame.
en.strength: People often feel seen by you.
en.cost: You may absorb too much emotional labor.
en.development_lever: Add one boundary check after empathy.
en.micro_action: Say internally: this is their feeling; I can support without replacing them.

zh-CN.title: 稳定有余，情绪读人不足
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 稳定能保护你，但关系需要对他人情绪的基本回应。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能保持冷静，却可能错过对方真正介意的点。
zh-CN.strength: 不容易被外部情绪带乱。
zh-CN.cost: 他人可能觉得你太理性或太远。
zh-CN.development_lever: 先回应感受，再处理事实。
zh-CN.micro_action: 说一句：我听到这件事让你很不舒服。

en.title: Steady, but less emotionally attuned
en.why_it_matters: Stability protects you, but relationships need basic emotional acknowledgment.
en.what_it_feels_like: You stay calm but may miss what the other person really cares about.
en.strength: External emotion disrupts you less.
en.cost: Others may experience you as too rational or distant.
en.micro_action: Say: I hear that this felt uncomfortable for you.

zh-CN.title: 理解他人与恢复都需降低难度
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 当共情和恢复都弱时，先降低情境复杂度比追求技巧更有效。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 强情绪场景可能让你想躲开或快速结束。
zh-CN.strength: 可从低风险互动开始建立经验。
zh-CN.cost: 高情绪劳动场景消耗明显。
zh-CN.development_lever: 用固定句式承接基础情绪。
zh-CN.micro_action: 先说：我需要一点时间理解你说的。

en.title: Lower complexity for empathy and recovery
en.why_it_matters: When both empathy and recovery are weaker, reducing complexity helps more than chasing advanced technique.
en.what_it_feels_like: High-emotion situations may make you want to avoid or end quickly.
en.strength: Low-risk interactions can build experience.
en.cost: High emotional-labor settings are draining.
en.development_lever: Use a stable sentence to receive basic emotion.
en.micro_action: Say: I need a little time to understand what you mean.

zh-CN.title: 读懂别人，也能处理关系
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 理解和行动结合时，共情更容易变成有效协作。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能读懂现场气氛，并推动关系回到可沟通状态。
zh-CN.strength: 适合复杂协作和关系修复。
zh-CN.cost: 可能过度承担协调者角色。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把责任边界说清楚。
zh-CN.micro_action: 问：这件事我能负责哪一部分？

en.title: You read others and manage the relationship
en.why_it_matters: When understanding and action combine, empathy becomes workable collaboration.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can read the room and move the relationship back to communication.
en.strength: Useful for complex collaboration and repair.
en.cost: You may overtake the coordinator role.
en.micro_action: Ask: which part of this is mine to own?

zh-CN.title: 读懂别人，但关系动作不足
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 看见对方感受后，还需要把理解转成一句话或一个动作。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你知道对方在意什么，却不一定知道怎么回应。
zh-CN.strength: 关系判断较细腻。
zh-CN.cost: 理解停在心里，别人感受不到。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把理解外化成确认句。
zh-CN.micro_action: 说：我理解你在意的是 X，而不是只是在反对。

en.title: You read others, but action is weaker
en.why_it_matters: After seeing someone's feeling, understanding needs to become a sentence or action.
en.what_it_feels_like: You know what matters to them but may not know how to respond.
en.strength: Nuanced relational judgment.
en.cost: Understanding stays inside and may not be felt.
en.micro_action: Say: I understand that X matters to you, not just that you disagree.

zh-CN.title: 会行动，但可能没读准情绪
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 关系动作如果没有情绪理解，容易变成流程化处理。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你会推进解决，但对方可能觉得重点没被接住。
zh-CN.strength: 能快速进入处理模式。
zh-CN.cost: 修复动作可能不够贴合。
zh-CN.development_lever: 行动前先做一次情绪校准。
zh-CN.micro_action: 问：这件事里你最难受的是哪一部分？

en.title: You act, but may miss the emotion
en.why_it_matters: Relational action without emotional understanding can become procedural.
en.what_it_feels_like: You move into solving while the other person may feel the point was missed.
en.strength: Fast entry into action mode.
en.cost: Repair may not fit the real concern.
en.micro_action: Ask: which part of this felt hardest for you?

zh-CN.title: 关系理解和行动都需要脚手架
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 复杂关系不能只靠临场反应，需要可复用脚本。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你可能不知道对方为何反应强，也不知道下一句怎么说。
zh-CN.strength: 固定脚本能快速提升可用性。
zh-CN.cost: 临场压力下容易沉默或回避。
zh-CN.development_lever: 先学低风险确认句。
zh-CN.micro_action: 说：我可能没完全理解，你能再说一次你的重点吗？

en.title: Relational understanding and action need scaffolding
en.why_it_matters: Complex relationships need reusable scripts, not only improvisation.
en.what_it_feels_like: You may not know why they reacted strongly or what to say next.
en.strength: Stable scripts can improve usability quickly.
en.cost: Under pressure, silence or avoidance may appear.
en.micro_action: Say: I may not fully understand; can you restate your main point?

zh-CN.title: 能表达自己，也能维护关系
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 自我清楚和关系行动结合时，边界更容易被听见。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能说出自己的感受，同时照顾沟通继续。
zh-CN.strength: 适合边界、反馈和修复场景。
zh-CN.cost: 可能被期待承担沟通示范。
zh-CN.development_lever: 让表达更简洁。
zh-CN.micro_action: 用我感到、我需要、我建议三句完成表达。

en.title: You express yourself and maintain the relationship
en.why_it_matters: When self-clarity and relational action combine, boundaries are easier to hear.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can state your feeling while keeping communication possible.
en.strength: Useful in boundaries, feedback, and repair.
en.cost: You may be expected to model communication for others.
en.micro_action: Use: I feel, I need, I suggest.

zh-CN.title: 自我清楚，但关系承接不足
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 表达自己之后，需要给关系一个继续对话的入口。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能说清立场，但对方可能进入防御。
zh-CN.strength: 不容易丢失自我。
zh-CN.cost: 表达可能被听成指责。
zh-CN.development_lever: 表达后加一句共同目标。
zh-CN.micro_action: 说：我讲这个是希望我们下次更好配合。

en.title: Self-clear, but relational holding is weaker
en.why_it_matters: After expressing yourself, the relationship needs an entry point to continue.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can state your position, but the other person may become defensive.
en.strength: You are less likely to lose yourself.
en.cost: Expression may be heard as blame.
en.development_lever: Add a shared goal after expression.
en.micro_action: Say: I am raising this so we can work better next time.

zh-CN.title: 会维护关系，但自我容易后置
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 如果只维护关系，不表达自我，长期会积累消耗。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能把场面圆回来，但之后才发现自己不舒服。
zh-CN.strength: 关系稳定和协作维持能力强。
zh-CN.cost: 自己的需求容易被延后。
zh-CN.development_lever: 回应前先问自己底线。
zh-CN.micro_action: 在答应前停三秒，确认我是否真的可以。

en.title: You maintain relationships, but self may come later
en.why_it_matters: If you only preserve the relationship and do not express yourself, cost accumulates.
en.what_it_feels_like: You smooth the moment, then later notice discomfort.
en.strength: Strong relational stability and collaboration maintenance.
en.cost: Your needs may be delayed.
en.micro_action: Pause three seconds before agreeing and ask whether you truly can.

zh-CN.title: 自我表达和关系修复都需要练习
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 当自我和关系动作都弱时，先从低风险表达开始。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你可能既不想说破，也不知道怎么收场。
zh-CN.strength: 可用结构化脚本降低难度。
zh-CN.cost: 问题容易拖延或变成误会。
zh-CN.development_lever: 练习一句低强度真实表达。
zh-CN.micro_action: 说：这件事我还需要想一下，晚点回复你。

en.title: Self-expression and repair both need practice
en.why_it_matters: When self and relational moves are both weaker, start with low-risk expression.
en.what_it_feels_like: You may not want to say it directly and may not know how to close the loop.
en.strength: Structured scripts can lower difficulty.
en.cost: Issues may be delayed or become misunderstandings.
en.micro_action: Say: I need to think about this and will reply later.

zh-CN.title: 压力下仍能沟通和修复
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 恢复能力和关系行动结合，是冲突后继续合作的关键。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你能先稳住自己，再把对话拉回问题本身。
zh-CN.strength: 冲突恢复和协作韧性强。
zh-CN.cost: 可能成为默认救火者。
zh-CN.development_lever: 把修复责任分给双方。
zh-CN.micro_action: 问：我们各自下一步能做什么？

en.title: You can communicate and repair under pressure
en.why_it_matters: Recovery plus relational action is key to collaboration after conflict.
en.what_it_feels_like: You can steady yourself and bring the conversation back to the issue.
en.strength: Strong conflict recovery and collaborative resilience.
en.cost: You may become the default fixer.
en.micro_action: Ask: what can each of us do next?

zh-CN.title: 自己能稳住，但关系未必修复
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 你恢复了，不代表对话或关系已经恢复。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你可能觉得事情过去了，但对方还停在情绪里。
zh-CN.strength: 能减少个人失控。
zh-CN.cost: 关系裂缝可能被低估。
zh-CN.development_lever: 复位后做一次关系确认。
zh-CN.micro_action: 说：刚才那段对话你现在感觉怎么样？

en.title: You stabilize yourself, but repair may not happen
en.why_it_matters: Your recovery does not mean the conversation or relationship has recovered.
en.what_it_feels_like: You may feel it has passed while the other person is still in it.
en.strength: Less personal escalation.
en.cost: Relationship cracks may be underestimated.
en.micro_action: Say: how are you feeling about that conversation now?

zh-CN.title: 想修复关系，但压力下难稳定
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 关系意愿很重要，但压力未复位时动作容易变形。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 你想把事情讲好，却可能越讲越急。
zh-CN.strength: 有合作和修复动机。
zh-CN.cost: 调节不足会削弱修复效果。
zh-CN.development_lever: 先复位，再修复。
zh-CN.micro_action: 先暂停十分钟，再发出修复信息。

en.title: You want repair, but pressure makes stability harder
en.why_it_matters: Repair motivation matters, but actions distort when you have not reset.
en.what_it_feels_like: You want to talk it through, but may become more urgent as you speak.
en.strength: Motivation for cooperation and repair.
en.cost: Weak regulation can reduce repair effectiveness.
en.micro_action: Pause for ten minutes before sending the repair message.

zh-CN.title: 压力和关系修复都需要最小闭环
zh-CN.why_it_matters: 高压关系场景中，需要简单、可重复的停顿和回到问题的动作。
zh-CN.what_it_feels_like: 冲突中你可能沉默、爆发或想尽快结束。
zh-CN.strength: 小流程能显著降低失控概率。
zh-CN.cost: 没有流程时关系容易积累未修复问题。
zh-CN.development_lever: 建立冲突暂停协议。
zh-CN.micro_action: 说：我需要十分钟冷静，然后我们只谈下一步。

en.title: Pressure and repair need a minimal loop
en.why_it_matters: High-pressure relational situations need simple repeatable pauses and return-to-issue moves.
en.what_it_feels_like: In conflict, you may go silent, escalate, or want to end quickly.
en.strength: A small process can reduce escalation risk.
en.cost: Without a process, unrepaired issues accumulate.
en.micro_action: Say: I need ten minutes to cool down, then let's discuss only the next step.

zh-CN.title: 反馈场景
zh-CN.typical_response: 收到评价或修改意见时，你可能先捕捉语气和关系信号，再处理信息本身。
zh-CN.strength: 能注意到反馈背后的真实意图和关系温度。
zh-CN.cost: 如果恢复不足，容易把反馈体验成否定。
zh-CN.better_move: 先拆分事实、情绪和下一步：对方说了什么，我有什么感受，我要确认什么。

en.title: Feedback
en.typical_response: When receiving critique or edits, you may notice tone and relational cues before processing the information.
en.strength: You can notice intent and relational temperature behind feedback.
en.cost: When recovery is weak, feedback may feel like rejection.
en.better_move: Separate facts, feeling, and next step: what was said, what I feel, what I need to clarify.

zh-CN.title: 冲突场景
zh-CN.typical_response: 出现分歧时，你可能在维护关系和表达自己之间摇摆。
zh-CN.strength: 有机会同时看见双方需求。
zh-CN.cost: 如果没有暂停流程，容易过度解释、回避或急于修复。
zh-CN.better_move: 先确认共同目标，再只讨论一个具体问题。

en.title: Conflict
en.typical_response: During disagreement, you may move between preserving the relationship and expressing yourself.
en.strength: You can often see needs on both sides.
en.cost: Without a pause process, you may over-explain, avoid, or rush repair.
en.better_move: Name the shared goal first, then discuss one specific issue.

zh-CN.title: 关系边界
zh-CN.typical_response: 当别人需要你支持时，你可能很快进入理解或承担。
zh-CN.strength: 容易让对方感到被接住。
zh-CN.cost: 支持和代替之间的边界可能变模糊。
zh-CN.better_move: 先问自己：我能支持到哪里，哪一部分仍然属于对方。

en.title: Relationship Boundaries
en.typical_response: When someone needs support, you may quickly move into understanding or taking responsibility.
en.strength: Others may feel received and understood.
en.cost: The line between supporting and replacing can blur.
en.better_move: Ask yourself: how far can I support, and which part remains theirs?

zh-CN.title: 团队协作
zh-CN.typical_response: 在多人协作中，你可能同时追踪任务、关系和现场情绪。
zh-CN.strength: 能发现协作中的隐性阻力。
zh-CN.cost: 如果总是主动协调，容易承担过多情绪劳动。
zh-CN.better_move: 把观察转成具体协作请求，而不是默默补位。

en.title: Team Collaboration
en.typical_response: In group work, you may track task, relationship, and emotional climate at the same time.
en.strength: You can notice hidden friction in collaboration.
en.cost: If you always coordinate, you may carry too much emotional labor.
en.better_move: Turn observations into concrete collaboration requests instead of silently compensating.

zh-CN.title: 压力恢复
zh-CN.typical_response: 高压后你可能仍在脑内回放对话、评价或细节。
zh-CN.strength: 复盘能力可以帮助你学习模式。
zh-CN.cost: 没有恢复边界时，复盘会变成反刍。
zh-CN.better_move: 给复盘设限：只写三个事实、一个感受、一个下次动作。

en.title: Pressure Recovery
en.typical_response: After pressure, you may replay conversations, judgments, or details in your head.
en.strength: Review can help you learn patterns.
en.cost: Without recovery boundaries, review turns into rumination.
en.better_move: Limit review to three facts, one feeling, and one next action.

zh-CN.title: 职业环境
zh-CN.typical_response: 你对岗位中的人际密度、情绪劳动和反馈强度会有不同消耗。
zh-CN.strength: 理解环境变量后，更容易选择适合自己的工作节奏。
zh-CN.cost: 只看职位名称，容易忽略真正消耗你的工作条件。
zh-CN.better_move: 评估岗位时优先询问互动频率、冲突频率和恢复空间。

en.title: Career Environment
en.typical_response: Interpersonal density, emotional labor, and feedback intensity can drain you differently across roles.
en.strength: Understanding environmental variables helps you choose a better work rhythm.
en.cost: Job titles alone can hide the conditions that actually drain you.
en.better_move: When evaluating roles, ask about interaction frequency, conflict frequency, and recovery space.

zh-CN.label: 低人际密度
zh-CN.meaning: 多数时间独立推进，互动频率较低。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合需要恢复空间或深度专注的人。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 可能减少练习关系动作的机会。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认岗位是否真的允许长时间独立工作。

en.label: Low Interpersonal Density
en.meaning: Most work is independent with fewer interactions.
en.fit_signal: Can fit people who need recovery space or deep focus.
en.strain_signal: May reduce practice opportunities for relational action.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether the role truly allows long independent work blocks.

zh-CN.label: 中等人际密度
zh-CN.meaning: 日常有固定协作，但不是持续社交。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合在协作和独立之间切换。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认每周会议、同步和跨团队协作频率。

en.label: Medium Interpersonal Density
en.meaning: Regular collaboration without constant social demand.
en.fit_signal: Fits switching between collaboration and independent work.
en.strain_signal: Too many meetings can still drain.
en.what_to_verify: Check weekly meetings, syncs, and cross-team collaboration frequency.

zh-CN.label: 高人际密度
zh-CN.meaning: 大量沟通、协调和即时互动。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 可发挥共情、协作和关系管理优势。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 恢复不足时容易情绪过载。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认是否有可控的独处和恢复窗口。

en.label: High Interpersonal Density
en.meaning: Frequent communication, coordination, and real-time interaction.
en.fit_signal: Can use empathy, collaboration, and relationship-management strengths.
en.strain_signal: Weak recovery can lead to overload.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether protected solo recovery windows exist.

zh-CN.label: 低情绪劳动
zh-CN.meaning: 较少承接他人情绪或安抚关系。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合需要降低情绪消耗的人。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 可能缺少运用共情优势的空间。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认用户、客户或团队情绪压力是否较低。

en.label: Low Emotional Labor
en.meaning: Less need to hold or soothe others' emotions.
en.fit_signal: Fits people who need lower emotional load.
en.strain_signal: May offer less space to use empathy strengths.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether user, client, or team emotional pressure is actually low.

zh-CN.label: 中等情绪劳动
zh-CN.meaning: 需要一定理解和安抚，但通常有边界。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合练习共情与边界并存。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 边界不清时会累积消耗。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认是否有升级、转介或交接机制。

en.label: Medium Emotional Labor
en.meaning: Some understanding and soothing are needed, usually with boundaries.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether escalation, referral, or handoff mechanisms exist.

zh-CN.label: 高情绪劳动
zh-CN.meaning: 经常承接焦虑、投诉、冲突或脆弱情绪。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 低恢复者容易被情绪场拖走。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认督导、复盘和休息制度是否真实存在。

en.label: High Emotional Labor
en.meaning: Frequent exposure to anxiety, complaints, conflict, or vulnerability.
en.strain_signal: Low recovery can make the emotional field pull you in.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether supervision, review, and rest systems are real.

zh-CN.label: 低冲突频率
zh-CN.meaning: 较少谈判、投诉或强分歧。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 可能较少训练冲突修复。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认冲突是否只是被隐藏到异步沟通中。

en.label: Low Conflict Frequency
en.meaning: Fewer negotiations, complaints, or strong disagreements.
en.strain_signal: May offer less practice in conflict repair.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether conflict is merely hidden in async communication.

zh-CN.label: 中等冲突频率
zh-CN.meaning: 有周期性分歧，但通常有流程。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 流程不清时会放大关系压力。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认冲突如何升级、记录和收口。

en.label: Medium Conflict Frequency
en.what_to_verify: Check how conflict is escalated, recorded, and closed.

zh-CN.label: 高冲突频率
zh-CN.meaning: 经常面对投诉、博弈、谈判或利益冲突。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 高调节和高关系管理者可发挥优势。
zh-CN.strain_signal: ER 或 RM 低时消耗显著。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认是否有明确授权、边界和复盘支持。

en.label: High Conflict Frequency
en.meaning: Frequent complaints, negotiation, bargaining, or interest conflict.
en.fit_signal: High ER and RM can become strengths.
en.strain_signal: Low ER or RM is costly here.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether authority, boundaries, and review support are clear.

zh-CN.label: 低反馈强度
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合对评价敏感且需要稳定节奏的人。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认是否仍有清晰目标和周期复盘。

en.label: Low Feedback Intensity
en.meaning: Evaluation and revision are less frequent.
en.fit_signal: Fits people sensitive to evaluation who need a steadier rhythm.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether clear goals and periodic review still exist.

zh-CN.label: 中等反馈强度
zh-CN.strain_signal: 恢复不足时可能反复回想。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认反馈是否具体、可执行、不过度公开。

en.label: Medium Feedback Intensity
en.strain_signal: Weak recovery may lead to replaying feedback.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether feedback is specific, actionable, and not overly public.

zh-CN.label: 高反馈强度
zh-CN.meaning: 频繁被评价、迭代或公开比较。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 高觉察和高调节者可快速迭代。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 低调节者容易把反馈体验成否定。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认是否有安全反馈文化和恢复空间。

en.label: High Feedback Intensity
en.meaning: Frequent evaluation, iteration, or public comparison.
en.fit_signal: High SA and ER can support fast iteration.
en.strain_signal: Low ER may make feedback feel like rejection.
en.what_to_verify: Check for a safe feedback culture and recovery space.

zh-CN.label: 低自主恢复空间
zh-CN.meaning: 节奏常被外部打断，难以独处恢复。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合恢复需求低且即时响应强的人。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 高共情低恢复者风险较高。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认是否允许暂停、调班或离线恢复。

en.label: Low Autonomy Recovery
en.meaning: Rhythm is often interrupted, with little solo recovery.
en.fit_signal: Fits people with low recovery needs and strong real-time response.
en.strain_signal: High empathy with low recovery is risky here.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether pauses, shift changes, or offline recovery are allowed.

zh-CN.label: 中等自主恢复空间
zh-CN.meaning: 有一定独立安排，但仍受团队节奏影响。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合多数人维持稳定表现。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 忙季或危机期可能被压缩。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认高峰期的恢复安排。

en.label: Medium Autonomy Recovery
en.meaning: Some independent rhythm exists, though team rhythm still matters.
en.strain_signal: Busy or crisis periods may compress it.
en.what_to_verify: Check recovery arrangements during peak periods.

zh-CN.label: 高自主恢复空间
zh-CN.meaning: 可以较多控制节奏、沟通窗口和深度工作时间。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 有利于敏感、深度复盘或高恢复需求者。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 也可能带来孤立或反馈不足。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认独立性不会变成缺少支持。

en.label: High Autonomy Recovery
en.meaning: More control over rhythm, communication windows, and deep-work time.
en.fit_signal: Helpful for sensitive, reflective, or high-recovery-need people.
en.strain_signal: Can also create isolation or insufficient feedback.
en.what_to_verify: Check that autonomy does not mean lack of support.

zh-CN.label: 低协作复杂度
zh-CN.meaning: 角色、接口和责任较清楚。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 降低关系误解和协调成本。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 可能较少发挥复杂协调优势。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认职责是否稳定且边界清楚。

en.label: Low Collaboration Complexity
en.meaning: Roles, interfaces, and responsibilities are clear.
en.strain_signal: May offer less space for complex coordination strengths.
en.what_to_verify: Check whether responsibilities are stable and boundaries clear.

zh-CN.label: 中等协作复杂度
zh-CN.meaning: 需要跨角色协作，但仍有明确流程。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 适合练习关系管理和反馈沟通。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认决策权、优先级和冲突处理方式。

en.label: Medium Collaboration Complexity
en.meaning: Cross-role collaboration is needed with some clear process.
en.fit_signal: Good for practicing relationship management and feedback communication.
en.what_to_verify: Check decision rights, priorities, and conflict-handling process.

zh-CN.label: 高协作复杂度
zh-CN.meaning: 多方目标、利益和节奏需要持续协调。
zh-CN.fit_signal: 高 RM 与稳定 ER 能发挥明显优势。
zh-CN.strain_signal: 边界不清时容易长期过载。
zh-CN.what_to_verify: 确认是否有正式协调机制和优先级裁决。

en.label: High Collaboration Complexity
en.meaning: Multiple goals, interests, and rhythms require ongoing coordination.
en.fit_signal: High RM and stable ER can become clear strengths.
en.strain_signal: Unclear boundaries can cause chronic overload.
en.what_to_verify: Check formal coordination mechanisms and priority arbitration.

zh-CN.title: 情绪命名处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 先命名，才有可能选择回应。
zh-CN.do_today: 今天选择一个具体情绪词，写下触发它的场景。
zh-CN.script: 我现在感到的是 X，不代表我必须立刻做决定。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：记录一个情绪词。
第 2 天：补充身体感受。
第 3 天：写下触发场景。
第 4 天：区分事实和解释。
第 5 天：写一个可控动作。
第 6 天：复盘一次沟通。
第 7 天：选出最常见触发点。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把情绪词变成自我评价。

en.title: Emotion Labeling
en.why_this_matters: Naming comes before choosing a response.
en.do_today: Choose one specific emotion word today and write the triggering context.
en.script: What I feel now is X; it does not mean I must decide immediately.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: record one emotion word.
Day 2: add body sensations.
Day 3: write the trigger.
Day 4: separate fact and interpretation.
Day 5: write one controllable action.
Day 6: review one conversation.
Day 7: identify the most common trigger.
en.watch_out: Do not turn emotion words into self-judgment.

zh-CN.title: 暂停与恢复处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 调节不是压住情绪，而是给选择回应争取空间。
zh-CN.do_today: 遇到触发时暂停 60 秒，再回复。
zh-CN.script: 我需要一分钟整理一下，再继续说。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：练 60 秒暂停。
第 2 天：加入一次深呼吸。
第 3 天：离开屏幕一分钟。
第 4 天：记录暂停前后的差异。
第 5 天：在反馈场景使用。
第 6 天：在冲突前使用。
第 7 天：固定一个恢复动作。
zh-CN.watch_out: 暂停不是逃避，暂停后要回到对话。

en.title: Pause and Recovery
en.why_this_matters: Regulation is not suppressing emotion; it creates room for choice.
en.do_today: When triggered, pause for 60 seconds before replying.
en.script: I need a minute to organize my thoughts before continuing.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: practice a 60-second pause.
Day 2: add one deep breath.
Day 3: step away from the screen for one minute.
Day 4: note the before-and-after difference.
Day 5: use it in feedback.
Day 6: use it before conflict.
Day 7: fix one recovery action.
en.watch_out: Pausing is not avoidance; return to the conversation.

zh-CN.title: 反馈减压处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 反馈容易混合事实、关系和自我评价，需要拆开处理。
zh-CN.do_today: 把一次反馈拆成事实、感受、下一步三栏。
zh-CN.script: 我先确认事实：你希望我调整的是 X，对吗？
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：拆一次反馈。
第 2 天：只问一个澄清问题。
第 3 天：延迟自我评价。
第 4 天：记录可行动项。
第 5 天：复盘语气触发。
第 6 天：向对方确认优先级。
第 7 天：总结一个反馈模板。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把所有反馈都理解成人身否定。

en.title: Feedback Decompression
en.why_this_matters: Feedback mixes facts, relationship cues, and self-evaluation; separate them.
en.do_today: Split one feedback event into facts, feelings, and next step.
en.script: Let me confirm the fact: you want me to adjust X, correct?
seven_day_plan: Day 1: split one feedback event.
Day 2: ask only one clarifying question.
Day 3: delay self-judgment.
Day 4: record the action item.
Day 5: review tone triggers.
Day 6: confirm priority.
Day 7: summarize a feedback template.
en.watch_out: Do not treat all feedback as personal rejection.

zh-CN.title: 共情边界处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 高共情需要边界，才能长期有效。
zh-CN.do_today: 支持别人前先确认自己能支持到哪里。
zh-CN.script: 我愿意听你说十分钟，然后我们一起看下一步。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：识别一次我在承担什么。
第 2 天：练习时间边界。
第 3 天：练习责任边界。
第 4 天：支持后做恢复。
第 5 天：区分理解和代替。
第 6 天：复盘一次求助场景。
第 7 天：写下自己的支持边界。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要用冷漠来替代边界。

en.title: Empathy Boundary
en.why_this_matters: High empathy needs boundaries to remain sustainable.
en.do_today: Before supporting someone, decide how far you can support.
en.script: I can listen for ten minutes, then we can look at the next step together.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: identify what you are carrying.
Day 2: practice a time boundary.
Day 3: practice a responsibility boundary.
Day 4: recover after support.
Day 5: separate understanding from replacing.
Day 6: review one help-seeking situation.
Day 7: write your support boundary.
en.watch_out: Do not replace boundaries with coldness.

zh-CN.title: 冲突后修复处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 冲突后的修复决定关系能否继续合作。
zh-CN.do_today: 选一个小冲突，发出一句修复确认。
zh-CN.script: 刚才我语气急了，我想把重点重新说清楚。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：识别一次未完成冲突。
第 2 天：写下自己的责任。
第 3 天：写下对方可能在意的点。
第 4 天：发出一句确认。
第 5 天：只讨论下一步。
第 6 天：复盘修复效果。
第 7 天：形成自己的修复句式。
zh-CN.watch_out: 修复不是全盘认错，也不是要求对方立刻原谅。

en.title: Repair After Conflict
en.why_this_matters: Repair after conflict determines whether collaboration can continue.
en.do_today: Choose one small conflict and send one repair check.
en.script: My tone got sharp earlier; I want to restate the main point clearly.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: identify one unfinished conflict.
Day 2: write your responsibility.
Day 3: write what may matter to the other person.
Day 4: send one confirmation.
Day 5: discuss only the next step.
Day 6: review repair effect.
Day 7: build your repair sentence.
en.watch_out: Repair is not total blame-taking or demanding immediate forgiveness.

zh-CN.title: 不升级表达处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 清楚表达需要让对方听得进去。
zh-CN.do_today: 用我感到、我需要、我建议三句表达一次需求。
zh-CN.script: 我感到有点被打断，我需要先说完，之后我也会听你的看法。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：写一句我感到。
第 2 天：写一句我需要。
第 3 天：写一句我建议。
第 4 天：合并三句。
第 5 天：降低指责词。
第 6 天：加入共同目标。
第 7 天：在低风险场景练习。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要用永远、总是这类绝对词。

en.title: Express Without Escalation
en.why_this_matters: Clear expression needs to be hearable.
en.do_today: Use I feel, I need, I suggest to express one need.
en.script: I feel a bit interrupted. I need to finish this point, and then I will listen to your view.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: write one I feel sentence.
Day 2: write one I need sentence.
Day 3: write one I suggest sentence.
Day 4: combine the three.
Day 5: reduce blaming words.
Day 6: add a shared goal.
Day 7: practice in a low-risk context.
en.watch_out: Avoid absolute words like always or never.

zh-CN.title: 支持但不拯救处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 有效支持帮助对方恢复主体性，而不是替对方解决所有问题。
zh-CN.do_today: 下次支持别人时，只问一个下一步问题。
zh-CN.script: 我能陪你想，但这个决定需要你自己做。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：识别一次想替别人解决的冲动。
第 2 天：只提供倾听。
第 3 天：只问一个问题。
第 4 天：明确你能做的部分。
第 5 天：明确你不能做的部分。
第 6 天：支持后恢复。
第 7 天：复盘对方是否更有主体性。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把对方的不舒服全部变成你的责任。

en.title: Support Without Rescuing
en.why_this_matters: Effective support restores agency instead of solving everything for the other person.
en.do_today: Next time you support someone, ask only one next-step question.
en.script: I can think with you, but this decision needs to be yours.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: notice one urge to solve for someone.
Day 2: only listen.
Day 3: ask only one question.
Day 4: clarify what you can do.
Day 5: clarify what you cannot do.
Day 6: recover after support.
Day 7: review whether their agency increased.
en.watch_out: Do not make all of their discomfort your responsibility.

zh-CN.title: 从冷静到有温度处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 稳定需要被他人感受到，才会变成关系中的安全感。
zh-CN.do_today: 在给建议前先确认对方感受。
zh-CN.script: 我能理解这件事让你不舒服，我们再一起看怎么处理。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：练一句情绪确认。
第 2 天：先确认再建议。
第 3 天：观察对方反应。
第 4 天：减少过快解释。
第 5 天：加入一句感谢。
第 6 天：复盘一次低温回应。
第 7 天：固定一个温暖开场。

en.title: Cold to Warm Response
en.why_this_matters: Stability becomes relational safety only when others can feel it.
en.do_today: Acknowledge the feeling before giving advice.
en.script: I can see this was uncomfortable for you; let's look at what to do next.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: practice one emotional acknowledgment.
Day 2: acknowledge before advising.
Day 3: observe their response.
Day 4: reduce fast explanation.
Day 5: add one appreciation.
Day 6: review one low-warmth response.
Day 7: fix one warm opening.
en.watch_out: Warmth does not mean giving up rationality.

zh-CN.title: 关系能量管理处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 关系投入需要节奏，否则优势会变成消耗。
zh-CN.do_today: 给一个高消耗互动安排恢复窗口。
zh-CN.script: 我现在可以聊二十分钟，之后需要休息一下。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：列出高消耗互动。
第 2 天：标出恢复方式。
第 3 天：设置时间边界。
第 4 天：减少即时回复。
第 5 天：安排独处窗口。
第 6 天：复盘能量变化。
第 7 天：保留一个固定恢复段。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要等到耗尽才开始恢复。

en.title: Relationship Energy Management
en.why_this_matters: Relational investment needs rhythm; otherwise strength becomes drain.
en.do_today: Schedule recovery after one high-cost interaction.
en.script: I can talk for twenty minutes now, and then I need a break.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: list high-cost interactions.
Day 2: mark recovery methods.
Day 3: set a time boundary.
Day 4: reduce instant replies.
Day 5: schedule solo time.
Day 6: review energy changes.
Day 7: keep one fixed recovery block.
en.watch_out: Do not wait until depletion to recover.

zh-CN.title: 冲突降温处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 降温不是退让，而是让问题重新可谈。
zh-CN.do_today: 下一次分歧时，只说共同目标和下一步。
zh-CN.script: 我们先别扩大问题，我想先确认下一步怎么做。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：识别升级词。
第 2 天：练习降温句。
第 3 天：暂停十分钟。
第 4 天：只谈一个问题。
第 5 天：确认共同目标。
第 6 天：复盘冲突过程。
第 7 天：写下自己的降温协议。
zh-CN.watch_out: 降温不等于压下真实问题。

en.title: Conflict De-escalation
en.why_this_matters: De-escalation is not surrender; it makes the issue discussable again.
en.do_today: In the next disagreement, state only the shared goal and next step.
en.script: Let's not expand the issue. I want to confirm the next step first.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: identify escalation words.
Day 2: practice a cooling sentence.
Day 3: pause ten minutes.
Day 4: discuss one issue only.
Day 5: confirm shared goal.
Day 6: review the conflict process.
Day 7: write your de-escalation protocol.
en.watch_out: Cooling down does not mean suppressing the real issue.

zh-CN.title: 自我连接处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 关系顺畅不能替代对自己需求的确认。
zh-CN.do_today: 答应别人前先写下我愿意和我不愿意。
zh-CN.script: 我想先确认一下自己的安排，晚点回复你。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：记录一个自己的需求。
第 2 天：记录一个不愿意。
第 3 天：延迟答应。
第 4 天：练习一个小拒绝。
第 5 天：复盘拒绝后的关系。
第 6 天：写下可接受条件。
第 7 天：总结自己的边界句。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要把照顾自己理解成破坏关系。

en.title: Self-Connection
en.why_this_matters: A smooth relationship cannot replace checking your own needs.
en.do_today: Before agreeing, write what you are willing and not willing to do.
en.script: I want to check my own schedule first and reply later.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: record one personal need.
Day 2: record one not-willing item.
Day 3: delay agreement.
Day 4: practice a small no.
Day 5: review the relationship after saying no.
Day 6: write acceptable conditions.
Day 7: summarize your boundary sentence.
en.watch_out: Do not treat caring for yourself as damaging the relationship.

zh-CN.title: 复测与低风险反思处方
zh-CN.why_this_matters: 低置信度结果不适合强解释，更适合作为复测提醒。
zh-CN.do_today: 只记录一个你认可的线索，不做稳定结论。
zh-CN.script: 这次结果我先当作提醒，等状态稳定后再复测。
seven_day_plan: 第 1 天：记录作答时状态。
第 2 天：检查是否太快或太累。
第 3 天：观察一个真实场景。
第 4 天：不做标签化解释。
第 5 天：选择复测时间。
第 6 天：保证安静环境。
第 7 天：重新完成测试。
zh-CN.watch_out: 不要用低置信度结果做重大决定。

en.title: Retest and Low-Risk Reflection
en.why_this_matters: Low-confidence results should not drive strong interpretation; they are better used as a retest cue.
en.do_today: Record only one cue that feels useful; do not form a stable conclusion.
en.script: I will treat this result as a reminder and retake when I am more settled.
seven_day_plan: Day 1: record your state during response.
Day 2: check if you were too fast or tired.
Day 3: observe one real situation.
Day 4: avoid labeling yourself.
Day 5: choose a retest time.
Day 6: ensure a quiet setting.
Day 7: complete the test again.
en.watch_out: Do not use a low-confidence result for major decisions.

zh-CN.title: 跨测评上下文边界
zh-CN.summary: 这一模块只说明你还完成过哪些相关测评，以及这些测评可以如何辅助阅读 EQ 结果。
zh-CN.how_to_use: 把 MBTI、大五人格或九型人格看作不同问题的证据来源：它们不能改写 EQ 分数，也不能替代情绪与关系自我报告。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不用于职业预测、招聘筛选、临床诊断、固定人格标签或情商能力宣称。

en.title: Cross-assessment context boundary
en.summary: This module only explains which related assessments are available and how they can support reading the EQ result.
en.how_to_use: Treat MBTI, Big Five, and Enneagram as evidence from different questions. They do not rewrite EQ scores or replace the emotional and relational self-report result.
en.claim_boundary: Not for career prediction, hiring, clinical diagnosis, fixed identity labels, or emotional ability claims.

zh-CN.title: MBTI 可作为偏好语境
zh-CN.summary: 你已有 MBTI 结果时，EQ 报告可以把情绪与关系信号放进偏好、信息处理和决策风格的语境中阅读。
zh-CN.how_to_use: 只把它当作“沟通与决策偏好”的背景，不把类型直接解释成情绪能力或关系表现。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不根据 MBTI 类型推断情商高低、工作表现、职业适配或关系成败。

en.title: MBTI can provide preference context
en.summary: When an MBTI result exists, the EQ report can be read alongside preference, information-processing, and decision-style context.
en.how_to_use: Use it only as communication and decision-preference background, not as an explanation of emotional ability or relationship performance.
en.claim_boundary: Do not infer EQ level, job performance, career fit, or relationship outcomes from MBTI type.

zh-CN.title: 大五人格可作为特质语境
zh-CN.summary: 你已有大五人格结果时，EQ 报告可以把情绪与关系信号放进稳定特质、压力反应和互动节奏的语境中阅读。
zh-CN.how_to_use: 只把它当作“长期行为倾向”的背景，不用它替代 EQ 的四维分数和行动建议。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不把大五特质转写为临床结论、招聘结论或固定人格优劣判断。

en.title: Big Five can provide trait context
en.summary: When a Big Five result exists, the EQ report can be read alongside broader trait, stress-response, and interaction-rhythm context.
en.how_to_use: Use it only as long-term behavioral tendency background. It does not replace EQ dimension scores or action guidance.
en.claim_boundary: Do not turn Big Five traits into clinical conclusions, hiring decisions, or fixed judgments of personality quality.

zh-CN.title: 九型人格可作为动机语境
zh-CN.summary: 你已有九型人格结果时，EQ 报告可以把情绪与关系信号放进动机、保护策略和压力下反应模式的语境中阅读。
zh-CN.how_to_use: 只把它当作“动机叙事”的背景，不把类型当作情绪反应的单一原因。
zh-CN.claim_boundary: 不根据九型类型推断治疗需要、招聘适配、职业成功或关系结局。

en.title: Enneagram can provide motivation context
en.summary: When an Enneagram result exists, the EQ report can be read alongside motivation, protective strategy, and pressure-pattern context.
en.how_to_use: Use it only as motivation narrative background, not as the single cause of emotional responses.
en.claim_boundary: Do not infer treatment needs, hiring fit, career success, or relationship outcomes from Enneagram type.

zh-CN.title: 未来将支持 16 道情境判断模块
zh-CN.description: 当前报告基于 EQ-60 自我报告。未来 EQ-SJT 16 会补充你在反馈、冲突、边界和压力情境中的选择方式。
zh-CN.what_it_adds: 它用于补充 self-report，帮助比较自我感知与情境选择之间的一致和差距。
zh-CN.what_it_is_not: 它不是 MSCEIT，不是认证能力测验，也不用于招聘筛选或临床判断。

en.title: A 16-item scenario module is planned
en.description: The current report is based on EQ-60 self-report. A future EQ-SJT 16 module will add how you choose responses in feedback, conflict, boundary, and pressure situations.
en.what_it_adds: It supplements self-report by comparing self-perception with scenario choices.
en.what_it_is_not: It is not MSCEIT, not a certified ability assessment, and not for hiring or clinical decisions.

personalization_routes.description: Internal deterministic route matrix for EQ v5 personalization. It selects asset IDs only; public explanation copy remains in report_assets.
